remarks: Gut renovated in 2019 and now going through a major refresh, this 3 bedroom townhouse has refinished floors, updated kitchen, new bathrooms and freshly painted interiors. All interior doors are being replaced, new recessed lighting, new carpeting on stairwells, plus new Central AC. New floors in Lower level family room. Many new appliances. New stone patio overlooking fenced yard. Move right into this bright and fresh home. Walk to town, train, schools and parks. Enjoy all that New Canaan has to offer.
